package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for pagination_validation_missing_shared_bound_helper: API modules that hand-roll page and page-size bounds in many handlers instead of a shared contract.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule110NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule110NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule110NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario110Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule110NegativeService, input Rule110NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
